pricing.title: Licensing
pricing.subtitle: Every image is available for personal or commercial use. All prices in EUR.
pricing.personalDesc: High-res file for personal home printing. Non-commercial, single household.
pricing.extendedDesc: Print multiple copies, give as a gift. Personal use only.
pricing.commercialDesc: Editorial, advertising, product use. Custom quote.
pricing.step1Desc: Explore the gallery and find a photo you love.
pricing.step2Desc: Fill in the contact form with the photo(s) you want and intended use.
pricing.step3Desc: Receive a payment request via PayPal, bank transfer, or Bizum.
pricing.step4Desc: Receive a secure download link valid for 5 days with your licensed file.
pricing.paymentMethods: Payment: PayPal, bank transfer, or Bizum
pricing.bizumNote: Bizum available for Spain-based buyers only.
pricing.copyright: The photographer retains full copyright. A license grants usage rights only.
pricing.fileInfo: High-res JPG, print-ready, colour-profiled for home printing.
